summary: Tested Multi-Set Paper Generation feature for Prashnakosh education platform. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly with all required UI elements for multi-set generation.

issues: The 'Step 1: Validate Question Pool' button appears disabled when no test is selected - this is correct behavior but could use a tooltip explaining why

critical_code_review_comments: Multi-set generation engine correctly implements zero-overlap guarantee via usedQuestionIds tracking
validateBlueprintCapacity function properly calculates maxSetsNoOverlap and provides remediation options
PDF generation correctly uses stored questionSets for multi-set papers (lines 3190-3198 in routes.ts)
Frontend paper-generator.tsx has all required data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data: 30 MCQ questions (10 easy, 10 medium, 10 hard) in 'Computer Science'/'Algorithms' and 15 short_answer questions (5 easy, 5 medium, 5 hard) in 'Computer Science'/'Programming'. Blueprint ID: a329db9d-bb3a-4fd7-8435-7cf845c09b32, Test ID: c06a468d-bcdb-44d9-a126-d05c608c15d2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-set paper generation feature is fully functional. Backend APIs (validate-multiset, generate-multiset) work correctly. Frontend /hod/generate-paper page loads with all required elements. The test with ID c06a468d-bcdb-44d9-a126-d05c608c15d2 has 3 stored question sets that can be used for PDF download testing.
verified_features: POST /api/tests/:id/validate-multiset - validates pool capacity for multi-set generation, returns sectionAnalysis with per-section availability and remediation options
POST /api/tests/:id/validate-multiset with setCount=4 (insufficient pool) - correctly returns valid:false with issues and maxSetsNoOverlap=3 suggestion
POST /api/tests/:id/generate-multiset - generates 3 non-overlapping sets with zero overlap (overlapCount=0), equal marks (allSetsEqualMarks=true)
POST /api/tests/:id/generate-multiset stores questionSets in test record
GET /api/tests/:id/paper-pdf?set=1 through set=3 - uses stored multi-set questionSets
POST /api/questions/bulk - works correctly for super_admin with tenantId from question data
Frontend: HOD dashboard Generate Paper tab shows Multi-Set Paper Generator button
Frontend: /hod/generate-paper page renders with test selector, set count, validate and generate buttons
Frontend: Validation summary component shows section analysis table with difficulty breakdown

issues: Section 'Section A - MCQ': Need 40 questions (4 sets x 10), only 30 available
Section 'Section B - Short Answer': Need 20 questions (4 sets x 5), only 15 available
